data.body: Investigation complete — root cause confirmed: Positional Bias (taxonomy item 11). Step 5 '### Create Tasks' contains a bare ticket create command WITHOUT -d (lines 823-826) as the first operative template; the correct HEREDOC form with -d appears later under 'Acceptance criteria format' sub-section (framed as reference, not imperative). Fix: remove bare code block, rename sub-section header to 'Required command form'. Confidence: high. Hypothesis test: confirmed empirically.
